content: SKYbrary Aviation Safety 'Rate of Turn' article + CFI Library: ROT (deg/sec) = (1091 * tan(bank_deg)) / speed_kt (TAS or groundspeed). Standard/Rate-1 turn = 3deg/sec. Bank angle for a rate-1 turn approximated as (TAS_kt/10)+7, valid to ~250-300kt. Increasing bank and/or decreasing speed both increase turn rate.
